news.title: Guidewire Software: Growth Story Is Even More Durable Today
news.text: Guidewire Software remains a buy as demand broadens, with cloud adoption and customer commitments expanding beyond a single large client. GWRE's fully ramped ARR reached $1.42B in Q2, outpacing reported ARR growth and signaling a robust growth runway. Customers are signing longer contracts—average new deal duration exceeds six years—while RPO surged 63% y/y to $3.5B, indicating increased platform importance.

news.title: Ethias Goes Live on Guidewire Cloud Platform, Building a Trusted Foundation for AI Innovation
news.text: LIÈGE, Belgium--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ethias SA and Guidewire (NYSE: GWRE) have announced that Belgian insurer Ethias has gone live on Guidewire Cloud Platform, marking an important milestone in the modernisation of its core systems. By adopting Guidewire Cloud Platform, Ethias gains the proven durability of Guidewire core systems together with a scalable, secure, and continuously updated cloud operating model.
